questionHtml: Sketch the curve C, showing clearly both asymptotes and the general behaviour of C as it approaches each asymptote. [You are not required to find any axes intercepts.]
markschemeHtml:
curve C in approx correct place, with negative y-intercept and part of the curve in 4th quadrant          A1

 

Note: The following A1 marks should be awarded independently provided there is an attempt to draw both branches of y=f(x).

 

vertical asymptote in approx correct place          A1

oblique asymptote in approx correct place          A1

approx correct asymptotic behaviour of C relative to both asymptotes          A1

[4 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the curve C, showing clearly both asymptotes and the general behaviour of C as it approaches each asymptote. [You are not required to find any axes intercepts.]
